scripts.start:mobile: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$root=(Resolve-Path .).Path; $expoHome=(Join-Path $root '.expo-home'); $env:EXPO_HOME=$expoHome; $env:USERPROFILE=$expoHome; $env:HOME=$expoHome; Set-Location satisfacao-mobile; npx expo start --port 8082 --clear"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start" "npm run start:front" "npm run start:mobile"
